title: Portable Crates Dark Mode
description: Provides a dark mode container gui for Portable Crates
body:
## Description Retextures the container gui for storage crates in [Portable Crates](https://modrinth.com/mod/portable-crates) It follows the design of [Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode) by nebulr.
## Requirements [Portable Crates](https://modrinth.com/mod/portable-crates) by Kamorzy
